title: OKPF Physical Skill Evidence Profile v0.1.0 Record Recommendations

record_type.description: Recommended values include capture_session, demonstration_episode, source_embodiment, target_embodiment_requirement, calibration_note, environment_context, adaptation_requirement, transfer_validation, failure_case, known_limitation, safety_note, policy_artifact, and evaluation_result. Unknown record types remain profile-valid unless a local strict policy says otherwise.

artifact_category.description: Recommended values: evidence, representation, policy, validation.

claim_level.description: Recommended values match the physical_skill_evidence.claim_level manifest convention.

validation_scope.description: Recommended values match the transfer_claim.validation_scope manifest convention.
